release.publicApiMeaning: PUBLIC_API.md files guard against accidental exports; they are not API or schema freezes.

invariants: Every fact has exactly one writer.
Do not derive intent from actual.

holds.text: MCP registry support is not part of the 0.2.x surface; it remains a hold until discovery, install, authority, and material contracts converge across products.

packages.name: @agent-os/kernel
packages.role: pure claim, boundary, material, JSON Schema, tool, context, and type algebra
packages.readmeStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for package ownership; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

packages.name: @agent-os/runtime
packages.role: Effect Tag runtime programs, admission projections, runtime-facing API types, and backend-neutral durable trigger authoring algebra
packages.boundary: backend-neutral runtime Tag contracts, projections, trigger registry contracts, and trigger authoring types
packages.readmeStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for package ownership; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

packages.name: @agent-os/backend-protocol
packages.role: storage-free backend protocol constants, intent-pointer payload parsers, retry policy, dispatch protocol, and handler fanout policy
packages.boundary: backend-only protocol algebra shared by concrete backend implementations
packages.readmeStatus: Backend protocol package. It is backend-only shared algebra, not a general-purpose core package.
packages.apiStatus: Backend protocol package. Public exports are limited to storage-free backend protocol semantics shared by backend implementations.

packages.name: @agent-os/backend-cloudflare-do
packages.role: Cloudflare Durable Object app facade and backend for agentOS runtime
packages.boundary: Cloudflare DO app facade, storage, alarm, SSE, dispatch, and binding materialization
packages.need: Cloudflare DO app facade and backend
packages.readmeStatus: Backend package. It is the only substrate package that imports `cloudflare:workers`.
packages.apiStatus: Backend package. Public exports include the Cloudflare app facade, binding builders, route builders, Durable Object factory, and backend-specific configuration types.

packages.name: @agent-os/backend-in-memory
packages.role: in-memory backend instance for runtime contract tests
packages.readmeStatus: Backend package for tests and local contract verification.
packages.apiStatus: Backend package for runtime contract tests. Public exports are limited to in-memory backend state, runtime Layer constructors, and Tag Live implementations.

packages.name: @agent-os/resource-carrier
packages.role: provider-neutral resource lifecycle facts, claims, settlement, and projection
packages.boundary: provider-neutral resource lifecycle facts and symbolic proofs
packages.readmeStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed in `PUBLIC_API.md` to prevent accidental exports; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x active development for provider-neutral resource carrier algebra. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

packages.name: @agent-os/resource-cloudflare
packages.boundary: Cloudflare data and Worker resource API calls to provider-neutral resource carrier payloads
packages.readmeStatus: Provider package. It materializes `@agent-os/resource-carrier` for Cloudflare data and Worker resources.
packages.apiStatus: Provider package. Public exports are limited to Cloudflare resource carrier factories and provider-specific material parsers.

packages.name: @agent-os/workspace-session
packages.readmeStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed in `PUBLIC_API.md` to prevent accidental exports; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x active development. Public exports are listed for accidental export control only; this is not an API freeze.

packages.name: @agent-os/workspace-session-cloudflare
packages.readmeStatus: Backend package. It uses structural SDK types instead of importing a Cloudflare SDK.

packages.name: @agent-os/tenant-material
packages.role: encrypted tenant credential records to execution-time material
packages.boundary: encrypted credential records to execution-time material
packages.readmeStatus: 0.2.x public-experimental. Experimental exports are listed in `PUBLIC_API.md` to prevent accidental exports; they are not frozen.
packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x public-experimental. This package may be used by first-party agentOS runtime packages, but its public API is not frozen.

packages.apiStatus: 0.2.x public-experimental. This package may be used by first-party agentOS runtime packages, but its public API is not frozen.

packages.role: install-time skill manifest to core tools

packages.name: @agent-os/deploy
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. Provider-specific deploy backends are separate materializers.

packages.name: @agent-os/deploy-cloudflare
packages.boundary: Cloudflare Worker artifact material, resolver composition, digest validation, and deploy carrier
packages.readmeStatus: Provider package. It materializes `@agent-os/deploy` for Cloudflare Workers while keeping raw provider material resolver-side.
packages.apiStatus: Provider package. Public exports are limited to Cloudflare Worker deploy bundle material, digest validation, resolver composition, resolver contracts, and deploy carrier construction.

packages.name: @agent-os/git-carrier
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. It is not a provider SDK and does not own provider-specific Git execution.

packages.name: @agent-os/staging-artifact
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. It owns symbolic artifact proof vocabulary, not artifact storage.

packages.name: @agent-os/verification
packages.readmeStatus: Carrier package. Verification policy and quorum rules remain app-owned.

packages.name: @agent-os/sandbox
packages.readmeStatus: Optional algebra package. It is not part of a freeze surface.

packages.name: @agent-os/sandbox-cloudflare
packages.readmeStatus: Optional backend package. It uses structural SDK types instead of importing a Cloudflare SDK.

packages.name: @agent-os/dynamic-worker
packages.readmeStatus: Optional runtime package. Public exports are package-owned and not part of a freeze surface.

packages.name: @agent-os/image
packages.role: image namespace reservation and projection helpers
packages.boundary: provider-neutral image event namespace and reader algebra
packages.readmeStatus: Optional package. It is not part of a freeze surface.

packages.readmeStatus: Tooling package. It is an ops adapter and not a substrate package.
